chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.16 of 2013 M/s. Exquisite Textile Industries Versus Bank Al-Falah Limited DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For order on office objection/reply at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.409/2013 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 19.12.2023 Mr. Khawaja Saiful Islam, Advocate for the Appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Khawaja Saiful Islam, learned counsel appearing for the appellant on instructions does not press this appeal. Accordingly, the instant First Appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
